name: @contentful/skill-kit
description: TypeScript SDK for building agent skills with CLI-driven workflows

scripts.build:examples: pnpm run build:examples:get-to-know-you && pnpm run build:examples:ts-patterns
scripts.build:examples:get-to-know-you: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/get-to-know-you/src/skill.ts -o examples/get-to-know-you/skill --mode node
scripts.build:examples:ts-patterns: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/ts-patterns/src/skill.ts -o examples/ts-patterns/skill --mode node
scripts.build:examples:bun: pnpm run build:examples:get-to-know-you:bun && pnpm run build:examples:ts-patterns:bun
scripts.build:examples:get-to-know-you:bun: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/get-to-know-you/src/skill.ts -o examples/get-to-know-you/skill
scripts.build:examples:ts-patterns:bun: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/ts-patterns/src/skill.ts -o examples/ts-patterns/skill
